item.name: Trahira
item.description:
A somewhat sizable fish that plies the muddy currents of Miyakabek'zu.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: This mottled brown wavekin effortlessly blends into its muddy habitat. When hunting, the agile fish will dart out with lethal precision, ensnaring its unlucky prey with razor-sharp fangs.
